# Salmen Khelifi

> Salmen Khelifi is a full-stack and automation engineer based in Tunisia who works remotely worldwide.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://khelifi-salmen.com/): Overview of Salmen's full-stack, mobile, and automation work.
- [Work](https://khelifi-salmen.com/work): Portfolio and case studies for software products, platforms, and automation projects.
- [Resume](https://khelifi-salmen.com/resume): Professional experience, technical skills, selected work, and contact details.
- [Blog](https://khelifi-salmen.com/blog): Engineering write-ups, architecture decisions, and project retrospectives.

## Flagship projects

Salmen builds each flagship product solo; each is pre-launch or early-stage.

- [Luxe Spa Booking](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/luxe-spa): A white-label booking, CRM, and management platform for appointment-based service businesses.
- [Anlingo](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/anlingo): An AI writing product spanning a web editor, Express API, billing, and a Flutter mobile companion.
- [ChakTech Platform](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/chaktech): A Tunisia-focused e-commerce platform with a localized storefront, admin back-office, and tenant-scoped API.
- [Noxivo](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/noxivo): A WhatsApp-first agency automation SaaS with a waitlist, protected dashboard, developer documentation, and Fastify workflow engine.
